category_sources: Official docs at semgrep.dev/docs identify Semgrep as a code scanning/static analysis product.
source_facts.description says Semgrep detects and prevents bugs and anti-patterns in codebases.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is semgrep; official docs use the Semgrep product name.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted at semgrep.dev/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/semgrep/semgrep, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports static-analysis and code-scanning tags.
